assertions.title: Creator-profile intake classifies the link and routes to candidate review

steps.action: Open intake page and enter a supported creator-profile link
steps.observed: Entered https://www.douyin.com/user/MS4wLjABAAAAnormal into the Douyin Link field

steps.expected: POST /api/intake succeeds and app routes away from intake
steps.observed: POST /api/intake was issued and browser navigated to /sessions/session_dbd78a635c371fcfb3d1c3cb

steps.expected: Candidate review is the first destination and intake success state is visible
steps.observed: Candidate review table with discovered rows rendered as the first post-intake surface

evidence.network: POST /api/intake -> navigation to /sessions/session_dbd78a635c371fcfb3d1c3cb; subsequent GET /api/sessions/session_dbd78a635c371fcfb3d1c3cb requests observed

assertions.title: Unsupported input stays on intake with actionable error feedback

steps.action: Enter malformed input notaurl on intake
steps.expected: Form accepts the typed value for submission
Stay on intake with preserved input and actionable V1-scope error
steps.observed: Browser remained on /, preserved notaurl in the input, and displayed 'This link is not supported. Please provide a Douyin creator profile or single video link.'
POST /api/intake returned a handled 400 error and no uncaught page errors appeared

evidence.consoleErrors: none; console logged one expected 400 Bad Request for unsupported input
evidence.network: POST /api/intake -> 400 handled rejection on unsupported link

assertions.title: Creator-profile intake does not start preparation before selection

steps.expected: App lands on candidate review before any preparation
steps.observed: First destination was /sessions/session_dbd78a635c371fcfb3d1c3cb with candidate review UI

steps.action: Inspect candidate review page and network activity
steps.expected: No prepare request or preparation statuses before manual selection
steps.observed: No prepare request appeared in network logs and page inspection reported hasPrepareText=false

evidence.network: Only intake and session-fetch requests observed; no POST prepare request after creator intake

assertions.title: Operator can recover from an invalid submission without refreshing

steps.observed: Unsupported-link error displayed with preserved input on /

steps.action: Replace invalid value with a supported creator-profile link without refreshing
steps.expected: Retry should succeed from same page
steps.observed: Replaced value with https://www.douyin.com/user/MS4wLjABAAAAnormal and submitted from the same intake page

steps.expected: App follows the normal creator success path
steps.observed: Browser navigated to /sessions/session_fe909c5c923fbb5169560b44 and rendered candidate review without reload

evidence.network: Sequential POST /api/intake calls observed: handled 400 for invalid input followed by successful creator-profile intake and session fetches

assertions.title: Creator discovery renders candidate review before any asset prep begins

steps.expected: First post-intake screen is candidate review
Discovered candidate rows are shown before prep begins

steps.action: Inspect network and UI for prep activity
steps.observed: No POST prepare request and no prep lifecycle labels appeared

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_dbd78a635c371fcfb3d1c3cb returned discovered rows; no POST prepare request observed

assertions.title: Candidate rows expose the required review columns

steps.action: Open candidate review for creator session

steps.expected: Rows expose title, publish date, duration, likes, comments, shares, score, recommended flag, and selection control
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed all required headers were present and sample rows showed matching values plus row checkboxes

assertions.title: Simple score and recommendation state are visible without any AI dependency

steps.expected: Simple score and recommended flag are visible in the UI
steps.observed: Rows displayed numeric scores including 93, 92, 89 and recommended states such as ✓ Yes and —
Only local session API requests were recorded; no AI-related network dependency was observed while score/recommended fields were present in rendered data

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_fe909c5c923fbb5169560b44 returned candidate data; no AI or external recommendation request observed

summary: Tested 7 assertions in the intake normal flow: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Creator-profile intake routed to candidate review without starting preparation, invalid input stayed recoverable on intake, retry from the same page succeeded, and candidate review exposed the required columns plus deterministic score/recommended fields without any AI dependency.
